input.context: Design a 60-minute workshop for OpenExO team, led by Salim Ismail with Kevin and Gillian, that explains MTP as a Protocol with worksheets and swipe-file takeaway materials.

output.summary: Shipped 4-document workshop bundle (workshop-design, participant-worksheet, swipe-file, facilitator-script) in MD + HTML at openexo-fOS/active-projects/mtp-as-protocol-workshop/. Encodes the three-layer protocol (Constraint/Decision/Identity) and the two litmus tests (Endorsement/Refusal) verbatim from ExO 3.0 OS Outline v15 Chapter 3 + SHAPE Component P. Workshop architecture: 3-min hook, 8-min pressure case, 10-min spec, 5-min Tesla walkthrough, 20-min silent draft, 9-min pair litmus, 5-min distribution close. Each facilitator owns one third of the room during working session. Failure modes seeded into swipe file.

input.context: Workshop revision: switch from in-person to Zoom-native online format, and reduce facilitators from three (Salim, Kevin, Gillian) to two (Salim leads, Kevin supports — no Gillian).

output.summary: All 4 docs revised. workshop-design and facilitator-script heavily rewritten: Zoom logistics (host=Kevin, co-host=Salim, breakout rooms, screen share, chat-DM cut signals, cloud recording with transcript). Salim now owns Block 4 walkthrough on Zoom Whiteboard (was Gillian). Coverage split halved instead of thirds. Block 5 whisper-help via Zoom private chat DM (no room-circulating). Block 6 pair litmus in breakout rooms with broadcast time markers and auto-return. Block 7 commitment round via unmute. Worksheet and swipe file lightly edited for online context (Google Doc per attendee, breakout swap).

input.context: Build a fillable, savable, printable interactive version of the participant worksheet. Must auto-save iteratively in the browser to keep data safe.

output.summary: Shipped participant-worksheet-interactive.html (30KB, 55 named fields, self-contained). Sticky toolbar: live save-status indicator, Print/PDF, Export JSON (auto-names with attendee + date), Import JSON, Clear All. Auto-save to localStorage (key mtp-protocol-worksheet-v1) on every input/change with 350ms debounce. beforeunload flushes any in-flight save. Print CSS hides toolbar and renders clean for paper or PDF (kills field-cell highlights, restores plain borders). Same fOS palette + fos-banner. No external deps beyond Google Fonts. JS validates with Node parser.
